# Release Checklist
## Documentation
- [ ] Requirements approved
- [ ] ADRs current
- [ ] Changelog updated
## Engineering
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Lint/type checks pass
- [ ] Build succeeds
- [ ] No Critical/High blockers
## Security
- [ ] Secret scan passes
- [ ] Dependency review complete
## Release
- [ ] Version assigned
- [ ] Release notes complete
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
